specs.title: US1-AC1: User can login with valid credentials
US1-AC3: Admin can access admin dashboard
US2-AC1: User can view their businesses
US2-AC2: User can create a business listing
US2-AC3: User can view business listings page
US3-AC1: User can view products page
US3-AC2: Subscription limits enforced in UI
US4-AC1: Categories page displays all categories
US4-AC3: XSS prevention in category names
US5-AC1: Admin can view dashboard with stats
US5-AC2: Stats API returns MTD metrics
US6-AC1: Admin can access media page
SEC-AC1: XSS prevention on categories page
SEC-AC3: No sensitive data in page source
PERF-AC1: Pages load within acceptable time
INT-AC1: R2 media URLs are accessible
INT-AC2: Map component loads if present
AC-US1-01: User without listing sees both Business and Non-Profit options when creating
AC-US1-02: User with existing listing sees only their listing type (Business or Non-Profit)
AC-US1-03: Create button disabled/hidden if user already has a listing
AC-US1-04: API prevents creating second listing even if frontend check bypassed
AC-US2-01: Non-profit listing becomes status published immediately after creation
AC-US2-02: Non-profit has no plan/subscription/expiry fields
AC-US2-03: Non-profit listing CANNOT have SKUs (SKU section hidden/not available)
AC-US2-04: Non-profit cannot be affected by grace period or auto-delete
AC-US3-01: New business listing created with status pending_payment
AC-US3-02: User redirected to select plan after creating business listing
AC-US3-03: After payment, order created with status paid after admin confirmation
AC-US3-04: Business listing status published only after admin confirms payment
AC-US3-05: Business page shows Pending Approval if not yet confirmed
AC-US4-01: SKU creation page/API blocked if business status != published
AC-US4-02: SKU count limited by plan (Basic=10, Pro=30, Max=60)
AC-US4-03: Error shown if user tries to exceed SKU limit
AC-US4-04: Admin can view and manage any business SKUs
AC-US5-01: When subscription expires, listing status set to expired
AC-US5-02: Grace period starts (60 days from expiry)
AC-US5-03: During grace period, Business Page shows renewal modal in Chinese
AC-US5-04: During grace period, NO create/edit SKU or Business Page content allowed
AC-US5-05: Grace period countdown visible to user
AC-US5-06: After grace period (60 days), listing and all SKUs deleted from database
AC-US6-01: Listing checks subscription status before allowing SKU operations
AC-US6-02: Expired subscription blocks all write operations (create/edit/delete SKU)
AC-US6-03: Expired subscription blocks Business Page content editing
AC-US6-04: Renewal during grace period restores full access immediately
AC-US7-01: Scheduled job runs daily (or on demand)
AC-US7-02: Finds listings with grace period ended (expiry + 60 days < now)
AC-US7-03: Deletes listing and ALL related SKUs
